# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Follow the agent rules in the repository root file `AGENTS.md` — it is the single source of truth for AI agents working with this repository.

Summary: this repository is the canonical offline ASPDotNetStorefront (ASPDNSF) 10 developer manual for RPS ecommerce-store work. Before recommending or implementing any RPS store change, search the manual's `*.htm` pages for the built-in token, AppConfig, XML package hook, event handler, or admin feature the platform already provides. Never invent tokens, AppConfigs, tables, or platform capabilities; distinguish documented ASPDNSF behavior from RPS-specific custom behavior; and do not modify archived manual pages unless a documentation fix is explicitly requested.
